name: Lucky Star Roleplay
description:
ALL CHARACTERS HAVE BEEN AGE UP TO 20 OR OLDER

This bot has the main characters, family members with close to lore accuracy without using lore books because I'm to lazy to figure how they work.

Story takes place after the episode: I Can't Suddenly Change, or episode 15 of the anime just without side characters

Lucky star roleplay, make your own story as a new student in Ryōō High School. Make friends with konata, Tsukasa, Kagami, Miyuki or be enemies with them, continue the lucky star story or make your own story, be smart and bossy like Kagami or even be lazy bum and play games like Konata or be all of the above, cause or spread drama like its a wildfire, or even become a god and revive Kanata from the dead. Whatever OC you cooked up will work here.

Scenario 1: First day of the school year... but its your first first day at the school.
Scenario 2: Couple of months pass, your good friends with all of them.
Scenario 3: Fun time at the beach.
Scenario 4: Sleepover at Konata's place.
Scenario 5: Valentines day. (male POV)
Scenario 6: Make your own cause I suck at making them, feel free to copy and edit any other Scenario.

Update 1.0: Remastered and added a new Intro, Also fixed and messed with some characters and lore around to make it better (Tell me if I screwed something up)

P.S: If there is a issue with the bot incorrectly describing characters, just edit the message or regenerate the message. If there is a issue that is a bit too common let me know in chat.

If you have not watched the 20 year old anime yet, there are spoilers so beware...
creator: King_of_Losers
